Infobox noise that should be ignored.

Luke Skywalker is a Jedi Knight from Tatooine and a hero of the Rebel Alliance.

He trained with Obi-Wan Kenobi and Yoda before helping defeat the Empire.

Early life

Section table noise.

Luke was raised by Owen and Beru Lars on their moisture farm and dreamed of a larger life among the stars.

This second paragraph should not be captured by the section opener parser.

Galactic Civil War

Luke joined the Rebel Alliance, rescued Princess Leia, and destroyed the first Death Star during the Battle of Yavin.

Jedi training

He studied the ways of the Force under Yoda and grew into one of the last Jedi of his era.

Legacy

Luke later helped restore the Jedi and inspired future generations across the galaxy.
